_comment: Example QER rule pack. Copy and edit for your own policy, then run: qer scan <host> --rules path/to/this.json  (JSON always works; .yaml/.yml works if PyYAML is installed). The 'match' DSL: boolean all/any/not over leaf conditions that test {scan:{...}} top-level facts, or assert some {primitive:{...}} / {certificate:{...}} matches. Operators are field-name suffixes: _contains _in _has _lt _gt _nonempty _exists; a bare field is equality (case-insensitive for strings).

rules.title: Inventory: ECDSA leaf certificate
rules.description: Org inventory rule: the leaf certificate uses an ECDSA public key (quantum-vulnerable; tracked for PQ migration).
rules.recommendation: Track CA support for PQ certificate signatures (ML-DSA / SLH-DSA).

rules.title: Policy: RSA leaf certificate flagged for PQ planning
rules.description: Organisational policy flags RSA leaf certificates so their reissuance can be scheduled when PQ CAs are available.
rules.recommendation: Plan ML-DSA / SLH-DSA reissuance; shorten validity to ease rotation.

rules.title: Policy: hybrid PQ key exchange not confirmed on this endpoint
rules.description: This endpoint was not proven to negotiate a hybrid post-quantum key-exchange group.
rules.recommendation: Enable a hybrid group such as X25519MLKEM768 on the server or load balancer.
